name: lootman
description: Build and packaging scripts for the LootMan mod FOMOD installer.

scripts.clean: node scripts/preflight.js clean && tsx scripts/cli.ts clean
scripts.clean:all: node scripts/preflight.js clean:all && tsx scripts/cli.ts clean --all
scripts.clean:wsl-build: node scripts/preflight.js clean:wsl-build && tsx scripts/cli.ts clean --wsl-build
scripts.build: node scripts/preflight.js build && tsx scripts/cli.ts build
scripts.deploy: node scripts/preflight.js deploy && tsx scripts/cli.ts deploy
scripts.undeploy: node scripts/preflight.js undeploy && tsx scripts/cli.ts undeploy

author: EideeHi
